goal: make module decisions executable before builds

validation.trigger_tests: node --test tests/unit/module-decision.test.mjs; node --test tests/unit/unified-build-queue.test.mjs tests/unit/module-decision.test.mjs; node --test tests/unit/v1-builder-queue.test.mjs
validation.compliance: git diff --check on changed files; em dash scan on changed files
validation.other: node devtools/module-decision.mjs pricing confidence prompt; vague prompt exits 2 with module_review_required
